Farm Owners Insurance

Specialized insurance coverage for hobby farms, small farms, and gentleman farms. Protect your rural property, animals, equipment, and structures with comprehensive farm owners insurance designed for non-commercial operations.

Get Free Quote

Get Your Farm Insurance Quote

Farm Insurance Available In:

Alabama Arizona Florida Georgia Indiana Maryland Maine New Jersey New York North Carolina Ohio Pennsylvania Tennessee Texas Virginia

What is Farm Owners Insurance?

Farm owners insurance is a specialized policy designed for hobby farms, small farms, and rural properties that aren't primarily used for commercial agriculture. It combines property, liability, and agricultural-specific coverages into one comprehensive package.

What's Covered:

  • Dwelling and other structures (barns, stables, sheds)
  • Personal property and farm equipment
  • Livestock and animals
  • Liability protection for farm activities
  • Farm machinery and tools
  • Loss of use and additional living expenses
Get Farm Insurance Quote

More Than Homeowners Insurance

Important: Standard homeowners policies typically exclude farm-related activities, animals, and structures. Farm insurance is essential for proper protection.

  • Covers agricultural structures
  • Includes livestock protection
  • Protects farm equipment and machinery
  • Broader liability coverage

Perfect for These Types of Properties

Farm owners insurance is designed for non-commercial rural properties and hobby farms.

Hobby Farms

Small-scale farming operations for personal enjoyment and supplemental income, not primary livelihood.

Gentleman Farms

Rural estates with acreage, animals, and farm structures maintained for lifestyle purposes.

Rural Properties

Large acreage properties with outbuildings, fencing, and land used for recreational purposes.

Equestrian Properties

Properties with horses, stables, riding arenas, and related equine facilities for personal use.

Comprehensive Farm Protection

Our farm owners policies provide extensive coverage tailored to your rural lifestyle.

Property Coverage

Protects your home, barns, stables, and other farm structures from covered perils.

  • Main dwelling and attached structures
  • Barns, stables, and outbuildings
  • Storage sheds and equipment buildings
  • Fences, gates, and infrastructure

Liability Protection

Covers legal responsibility for injuries or property damage on your farm.

  • Bodily injury to visitors
  • Property damage claims
  • Animal-related incidents
  • Legal defense costs

Farm Equipment & Machinery

Covers tractors, mowers, tools, and equipment used on your property.

  • Tractors and utility vehicles
  • Lawn and field equipment
  • Hand tools and power equipment
  • Theft and damage protection

Livestock & Animals

Protection for animals kept on your property for personal use or enjoyment.

  • Horses and livestock
  • Poultry and small animals
  • Death from covered perils
  • Optional mortality coverage

Optional Coverage Enhancements

Customize your policy with additional protection for specific needs.

Scheduled Equipment

Higher limits for expensive tractors, ATVs, and specialized equipment with specific values.

Equine Mortality

Comprehensive mortality coverage for high-value horses with veterinary expense options.

Fence Coverage

Extended coverage for extensive fencing systems across large acreage properties.

Loss of Income

Coverage for loss of income from small-scale farm product sales after a covered loss.

Water Rights Coverage

Protection for valuable water rights, wells, and irrigation equipment on your property.

Pollution Liability

Coverage for environmental cleanup and liability from fuel spills or contamination.

Real-Life Scenarios Where Farm Insurance Helps

Examples showing why farm owners insurance is essential for rural property owners.

Barn Fire

Lightning strike causes barn fire, destroying structure, hay storage, and farm equipment stored inside.

Visitor Injury

Guest is kicked by a horse, requiring surgery and ongoing medical treatment. Liability claim filed.

Equipment Theft

Tractor, mower, and tools stolen from property during overnight hours. Total loss of $45,000 in equipment.

Storm Damage

Severe windstorm damages roof, destroys chicken coop, and causes extensive fence damage across property.

Livestock Loss

Multiple animals perish in barn fire. Coverage helps replace livestock and rebuild operation.

Property Damage

Animals escape through damaged fence, causing property damage to neighbor's landscaping and vehicles.

Why Choose PCFG for Farm Owners Insurance?

We understand rural properties and provide personalized coverage across 15 states.

Rural Property Expertise

Specialized knowledge of hobby farms, equestrian properties, and small agricultural operations.

Customized Coverage

Tailored policies that match your specific property, animals, and activities.

Personal Service

Dedicated agents who understand your unique needs and provide ongoing support.

Protect Your Farm and Rural Property

Get a customized farm owners insurance quote today. Our experienced agents will help you find the right coverage for your hobby farm, equestrian property, or rural estate.

Get Farm Insurance Quote Call (877) 717-7234
